Event: Hidden Treasure Hunt
Event Date: 11/08/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: AR19
Coin Master Plate Mail

Once in a while for 5 sec, when the armor wearer takes damage from an attack, the armor wearer steals 15% physical armor, and health for 5 sec from the attacker and stuns that enemy for 0,5 sec. Triggers up to once per 1 sec.

Requirements: 98-100
